name: stonestory
description: StoneStory skills and plugin workflows for Hongloumeng character chat inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use Hongloumeng character chat skills inside Codex
interface.longDescription: Adds StoneStory character-chat skills, evidence-backed prompt assembly, and answer-evaluation workflows using the current Codex model and local StoneStory assets.
defaultPrompt: Use /skills and select stonestory:baoyu-chat to talk as 贾宝玉
Use /skills and select stonestory:daiyu-chat to talk as 林黛玉
Use /skills and select stonestory:stonestory-roleplay for the shared StoneStory entry
